cases.title: Verify a product can be added to the cart
cases.description:
* Click “Add to Cart” on a product and confirm it appears in the cart.
* Check that product name, price, and image are correct in the cart.

steps.action: Visit Find Bugs page
steps.expected_result: The page is loaded and displayed successfully

steps.action: Scroll the product listing page.
steps.expected_result: Product grid with “Add to Cart” buttons is visible bellow the product price on the product listing page

steps.action: Click **“Add to Cart”** on any product (e.g., *Flamingo T-Shirt*)
steps.expected_result:
* A confirmation message appears saying *“Product successfully added to your shopping cart”* 
* At the top of product listing page you can see message *“Product successfully added to your cart”* and a **“VIEW CART”** button is displayed next to it

steps.action: Click on button "VIEW CART" displayed on the top of your store page
steps.expected_result:
Page is redirected to Shopping Cart page

* Cart page is displayed with a **header navigation** showing steps: *Shopping Cart → Checkout Details → Submit Payment*.
* The **product section** shows:
    * Product **image** (thumbnail, left side).
    * Product **name** as a clickable link 
    * Product **price** displayed next to the name.
    * **Quantity selector** with “-” and “+” buttons and an input field (default value 1).
    * **Update button** below quantity field.
    * **Total price** calculated correctly for quantity 1
    * **Remove product (X icon)** visible on the far left of the row.
* The **Cart Totals** box on the right side shows:
    * Cart Subtotal 
    * Shipping
    * Grand Total (subtotal + shipping).
    * **Checkout button** and **Continue Shopping button** visible.
* Additional sections:
    * **Coupon field** with “Apply Coupon” button.
    * **Gift card field** with “Redeem Gift Card” button.
    * Sidebar shows “Select a Currency” dropdown and a “Hot Item” promotion with product image.

steps.action: Verify product details in the cart (name, price, image)
steps.expected_result: Product name, price, and image match the listing page

cases.title: Verify quantity update in cart
cases.description:
* Change the quantity of a product and confirm total price updates correctly.
* Verify quantity cannot go below 1 (or allowed minimum).

steps.action: Visit Find Bugs page
steps.expected_result: The page is loaded and displayed successfully

steps.action: Click **“Add to Cart”** on any product
steps.expected_result:
* A confirmation message appears saying *“Product successfully added to your shopping cart”*
* At the top of product listing page you can see message *“Product successfully added to your cart”* and a **“VIEW CART”** button is displayed next to it

steps.action: Click on button "VIEW CART" displayed on the top of your store page
steps.expected_result:
* Cart page is displayed with a **header navigation** showing steps: *Shopping Cart → Checkout Details → Submit Payment*.
* The **product section** shows:
    * Product **image** (thumbnail, left side).
    * Product **name** as a clickable link (*Dark Grey Jeans*).
    * Product **price** ($46.00) displayed next to the name.
    * **Quantity selector** with “-” and “+” buttons and an input field (default value 1).
    * **Update button** below quantity field.
    * **Total price** calculated correctly ($46.00 for quantity 1).
    * **Remove product (X icon)** visible on the far left of the row.
* The **Cart Totals** box on the right side shows:
    * Cart Subtotal = $46.00.
    * Shipping = $7.99.
    * Grand Total = $53.99 (subtotal + shipping).
    * **Checkout button** and **Continue Shopping button** visible.
* Additional sections:
    * **Coupon field** with “Apply Coupon” button.
    * **Gift card field** with “Redeem Gift Card” button.
    * Sidebar shows “Select a Currency” dropdown and a “Hot Item” promotion with product image.

steps.action: increase quantity (e.g., from 1 → 2).
steps.expected_result: Quantity updates and total price recalculate correctly.

steps.action: Decrease quantity (e.g., from 2 → 1).
steps.expected_result: * Quantity decreases and total price recalculates correctly.

steps.action: Try to decrease quantity below 1.
steps.expected_result: System prevents quantity from going below 1 (minimum)

cases.title: Verify multiple products can be added
cases.description:
* Add different products to the cart and ensure all appear correctly.
* Check that total price sums up correctly.

steps.action: Visit Find Bugs page
steps.expected_result: The page is loaded and displayed successfully

steps.action: * Add 3 products from store page into cart by clicking button "ADD TO CART" for each product
steps.expected_result:
* A confirmation message appears saying *“Product successfully added to your shopping cart”*
* At the top of product listing page you can see message *“Product successfully added to your cart”* and a **“VIEW CART”** button is displayed next to it

steps.action:
* Verify that all products added to the cart are listed on shopping cart page
* Click on button "VIEW CART" displayed on the top of your store page
steps.expected_result:
* All products appear with correct name, price, and image.


* Cart page is displayed with a **header navigation** showing steps: *Shopping Cart → Checkout Details → Submit Payment*.
* The **product section** shows:
    * Product **image** (thumbnail, left side).
    * Product **name** as a clickable link (*Dark Grey Jeans*).
    * Product **price** ($46.00) displayed next to the name.
    * **Quantity selector** with “-” and “+” buttons and an input field (default value 1).
    * **Update button** below quantity field.
    * **Total price** calculated correctly ($46.00 for quantity 1).
    * **Remove product (X icon)** visible on the far left of the row.

cases.title: Verify removing a product from the shopping cart
cases.description:
* Remove a single product and ensure it disappears from the shopping cart.
* Confirm total price is recalculated correctly.

steps.action: Visit Find Bugs page
steps.expected_result: The page is loaded and displayed successfully

steps.action: Add at least 2 products from the store page by clicking button "ADD TO CART"
steps.expected_result:
* A confirmation message appears saying *“Product successfully added to your shopping cart”*


* At the top of product listing page you can see message *“Product successfully added to your cart”* and a **“VIEW CART”** button is displayed next to it

steps.action: Click on button "VIEW CART" displayed on the top of your store page
steps.expected_result:
* Cart page is displayed with a **header navigation** showing steps: *Shopping Cart → Checkout Details → Submit Payment*.
* The **product section** shows for each product:
    * Product **image** (thumbnail, left side).
    * Product **name** as a clickable link (*Dark Grey Jeans*).
    * Product **price** ($46.00) displayed next to the name.
    * **Quantity selector** with “-” and “+” buttons and an input field (default value 1).
    * **Update button** below quantity field.
    * **Total price** calculated correctly ($46.00 for quantity 1).
    * **Remove product (X icon)** visible on the far left of the row.
* The **Cart Totals** box on the right side shows:
    * Cart Subtotal = $46.00.
    * Shipping = $7.99.
    * Grand Total = $53.99 (subtotal + shipping).
    * **Checkout button** and **Continue Shopping button** visible.

steps.action:
* Identify the product(s) you wish to remove 
* Click on the **“X” (remove icon)** located on the left side of the product row.
steps.expected_result:
* The selected product(s) is removed from the cart list and no longer appears in the cart table.
* The **Cart Totals** section is recalculated automatically (Subtotal, Shipping, and Grand Total update according to remaining products).
* If it was the last product in the cart or all products are removed the cart should display an **“**There are no items in your cart.**” message** with RETURN TO STORE button bellow

cases.title: Verify product details in cart
cases.description: Each cart item must display name, price, image, and quantity correctly.

steps.action: Visit Find Bugs page
steps.expected_result: The page is loaded and displayed successfully

steps.action: Click **“Add to Cart”** on any product

* A confirmation message appears saying *“Product successfully added to your shopping cart”*

steps.action: Verify product details (name, price, image and quantity)
steps.expected_result:
* The cart displays the exact product name from the listing page.
* Price matches the listing page format (e.g., $15.14).
* Product image is displayed without distortion or broken icons.
* Quantity is visible and editable, default set to 1.
